prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年同济大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2625名、3151名、3981名、4957名、5151名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2526名，年均后移约630名；2025年基准位次约5151名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划数：2021–2023年均为145人，2024年142人，2025年141人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划138人，较2025年减少3人，小幅缩招约2.1%，缩招理论上使竞争略有加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第18名，近年排名稳定在Top20，属于国内顶尖高校层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关事件（论文数据存疑、院长被免职等），但整体品牌效应仍强；抖音热度排名第26（较热），有一定关注度；2022年曾在河南出现严重投档断档（土木工程专业暴跌），2025年也有投档线异常报道，但主要发生在其他省份，山东省位次走势相对平稳；同济大学拥有17个A-及以上学科，其中土木工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、城乡规划学A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A等，学科实力极为雄厚，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，而同济大学王牌土木建筑类专业社会热度分化观望/明显劝退，可能影响相关专业报考热度；山东省考生总数持续增长，2021年约54.4万→2025年约68.1万→2026年约72万，竞争加剧；省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在437–444分之间，无明显波动；同济大学位于上海市，对山东省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生人数占全国总招生比例约14%（2025年数据），属于该校重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（年均后移约630名）、2026年计划小幅缩招（-2.1%）、山东省考生总数持续增长（+约3.9万）以及声誉偏负面等因素，缩招与考生增加对位次的作用方向相反，但考生增幅更大且历年后移趋势强劲，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准5151名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约5135名，区间4635–5635名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（国豪精英班）
- 人工智能（拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划班）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（计算机与电子类）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能化制造类）
- 理科试验班（数理化拔尖基地）
- 医学试验班。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 人文科学试验班
- 政治学与行政学
- 会计学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4635–5635名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业可冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档专业作为保底。同济大学工科实力顶尖，计算机与电子类、机器人与智能化制造类等新工科专业热度高且学科评估优秀，是性价比极高的选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tongji University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 2625, 3151, 3981, 4957, and 5151, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2526 places over the past 4 years, averaging about 630 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5151; the enrollment plan for Tongji University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category: 145 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 142 in 2024, and 141 in 2025; the 2026 enrollment plan (from the enrollment plan document) is 138 students, a decrease of 3 students from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.1%, which theoretically intensifies competition slightly, putting pressure on rankings to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 18th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the Top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities, with strong appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (questionable paper data, dean dismissed, etc.), but the overall brand effect remains strong; it ranks 26th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with a certain level of attention; in 2022, there was a serious enrollment gap in Henan (civil engineering major plummeted), and in 2025, there were also reports of abnormal admission cutoffs, but mainly in other provinces, with relatively stable ranking trends in Shandong Province; Tongji University has 17 A- or above disciplines, including Civil Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, providing sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, while Tongji University's flagship civil engineering and architecture majors show social popularity divergence/wait-and-see or obvious discouragement, which may affect the popularity of related majors; the total number of candidates in Shandong Province continues to grow, from about 544,000 in 2021 to about 681,000 in 2025, and about 720,000 in 2026, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (general category first segment) has been stable between 437 and 444 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from Shandong Province; the proportion of students enrolled in Shandong Province to the total national enrollment is about 14% (2025 data), making it one of the important source provinces for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (average backward shift of about 630 places per year), the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-2.1%), the continuous growth in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province (+ about 39,000), and the somewhat negative reputation, the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate increase on rankings are opposite, but the candidate increase is larger and the historical backward trend is strong. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 5151; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5135, with a range of 4635 to 5635.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry Top Base)
- Medical Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Humanities Experimental Class
- Political Science and Public Administration
- Accounting.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4635 to 5635, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors can be attempted as a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Tongji University has top-tier engineering strength, and new engineering majors such as Computer and Electronics, Robotics and Intelligent Manufacturing are highly popular with excellent discipline evaluations, making them a cost-effective choice.
